title: Zara's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Zara discovers colorful foods with her loving family, making delightful sounds as she explores red apples, yellow bananas, green peas, and more. Each page features a different colored food with playful sounds and gentle repetition perfect for very young children learning about colors and eating.

pages.text: Zara is hungry! Munch, munch, munch.

illustration.description: A happy toddler girl with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits in a bright yellow high chair. She wears a soft pink bib and claps her hands excitedly. The kitchen background shows warm wooden cabinets and a diverse family preparing colorful foods. Soft watercolor style with rounded shapes and high contrast colors.
illustration.alt: Zara sitting in her high chair ready to eat

illustration.description: Zara holds a bright red apple with both small hands, taking a big bite with a huge smile. Red juice drips slightly down her chin. Her eyes are wide with delight. The background is soft cream with subtle red watercolor splashes. The apple is oversized and glossy for high contrast.
illustration.alt: Zara eating a red apple happily

illustration.description: Zara squeezes a peeled yellow banana, getting some on her fingers and giggling. Her father, a tall man with dark skin and glasses, sits beside her smiling warmly. The banana is bright golden yellow against a soft lavender background. Banana pieces are scattered playfully around.
illustration.alt: Zara squishing a yellow banana with her father nearby

illustration.description: Zara picks up bright green peas one by one, popping them in her mouth. Her expression shows concentration and joy. A few peas have rolled onto her tray. The background is pale mint green with soft white clouds. The peas are perfectly round and vibrant green for easy recognition.
illustration.alt: Zara eating green peas one by one

illustration.description: Zara holds an orange carrot stick like a little drumstick, chomping happily. Her grandmother, an elderly Asian woman with silver hair and kind eyes, watches lovingly from behind. The background is warm peach with soft orange watercolor washes. The carrot is bright and chunky.
illustration.alt: Zara chomping on orange carrots with grandmother watching

illustration.description: Zara carefully picks purple grapes from a small cluster, making delighted slurping sounds. Grape juice stains her lips purple, making her look adorably messy. The background is soft lavender with deeper purple accents. The grapes are plump and glossy with high contrast.
illustration.alt: Zara eating purple grapes with purple-stained lips

illustration.description: Zara gently squishes blueberries between her tiny fingers, creating blue smudges. Her mother, a woman with light brown skin and long braided hair, helps guide her hand. The background is soft sky blue with white puffy shapes. The berries are deep blue and perfectly round.
illustration.alt: Zara smooshing blueberries with her mother's help

illustration.description: Zara raises her arms triumphantly with a huge smile, her face and hands colorfully messy from all the foods. Her whole diverse family surrounds her, clapping and smiling. Rainbow watercolor splashes fill the background. Her empty tray shows she ate everything. Everyone looks joyful and proud.
illustration.alt: Zara celebrating finishing all her colorful foods with her family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Zara's apple?
questions.explanation: Zara's apple is red! Red apples go crunch, crunch, crunch.

questions.question: What sound do the peas make?
questions.explanation: The green peas go pop, pop, pop when Zara eats them!

questions.question: What does Zara do with the banana?
questions.explanation: Zara squishes the yellow banana! Squish, squish, squish.
